---
title: "Two Sides of the Shield, The By Charlotte M. Yonge, author of “The Heir of Redclyffe,” “Unknown to History,” etc.. 2 vols."
---

## Two Sides of the Shield, The By Charlotte M. Yonge, author of “The Heir of Redclyffe,” “Unknown to History,” etc.. 2 vols.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1885
**Genre:** Fiction (modern)
**Format:** Book 8vo 2 vols 208, 209 pp

**Publisher:** London: Macmillan and Co.

### Notes

This is a sequel to <i>Scenes and Characters </i>and <i>The Stokesley Secret.</i>

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
